name: Bacon-Topped Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon in a 3-quart casserole dish; cover and microwave at HIGH for 6 to 9 minutes or until cooked through. Remove bacon with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. Add vegetables to the drippings in the casserole dish; microwave at HIGH for 6 to 8 minutes or until tender.
3. Blend in flour, salt, and pepper; stir well.
4. Gradually stir in half-and-half, milk, and chicken broth. Cover and microwave at HIGH for 7 to 11 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring at two-minute intervals.
5. Add cheese and stir until melted. Cover and microwave at MEDIUM for 2 minutes.
6. Top each serving with bacon.
